title: Sanam
desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

title: Sanam
desc: Amid the grim shadows of terrorism, love guides an army man and a village belle towards each other.

title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
desc: Preeti courageously shares her story in court but faces backlash when the perpetrator strikes again. Now, she's not only battling her trauma but also dealing with her family's rejection.

title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
desc: When Preeti gets raped by a murderer, she is abandoned by her family.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
desc: Pooja finds herself caught in a love triangle between her ex-husband and her boss.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
desc: Pooja's world shatters after Shiv's betrayal. But when Raj, a movie star, enters her life, things change-and so does her idea of love, strength, and moving on.

title: Chor Machaaye Shor
desc: Shyam hides a diamond; released from prison, he impersonates Inspector Ram, gains favor, romances, faces scrutiny, while rival criminals hunt the gem.

title: Chor Machaaye Shor
desc: A thief acts as a policeman to extract a stolen diamond from the police headquarters.

title: Mard
desc: After a cruel betrayal, Azad, a king, is imprisoned by General Dyer. His son embarks on a quest to liberate him and restore peace to their kingdom.

title: Mard
desc: King Azad is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer. Later, Azad's son comes to his rescue.

title: Indrajeet
desc: A retired police officer sets out to avenge his adopted daughter and son-in-law's murder.

title: Indrajeet
desc: Honest officer Inderjeet's life turns tragic, arrests love's father, faces transfer. Years later, avenges adopted daughter's murder, defying the law.

title: Tirchhi Topiwale
desc: Opposed lovers, Maya and Raj, find their paths when her parents' chosen suitor falls for someone else.

title: Vanvaas
desc: An elderly father, grappling with dementia, embarks on a life-changing journey.

title: Vanvaas
desc: Deepak, aging and forgetful, seeks his vanished family after Shimla to Benaras. Conmen harm him, but reformers expose organ trafficking and his memory returns.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
desc: Three orphan friends team up to avenge the killing of their fathers.

title: Maharaja
desc: Prince Kohinoor returns home and decides to defeat his parents' killer to save his people.

title: Parivaar
desc: A girl is abandoned by her relatives, but a street performer comes to her aid.

title: Laadla
desc: Raju can do anything at his mom's behest, even if it means giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Krishna
desc: Sunil's life takes a tragic turn when he is convicted for a crime he did not commit.

title: Ghatak
desc: When Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise a colony in Mumbai, he decides to strike back.

title: Ghayal
desc: Ajay takes a unique route in his quest to avenge his brother's murder.

title: Sanam
desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

title: Divya Shakti
desc: A corrupt cop, a newspaper editor who glosses over mob activities, and a young reporter striving to tell the truth all combine in this explosive tale.

title: King Uncle
desc: Industrialist Ashok Bansal's harsh ways push away his siblings. But when orphan girl Munna enters their lives, she slowly softens his tough heart and changes the family.
